CVE-2021-42260.title: TinyXML through 2.6.2 has an infinite loop in TiXmlParsingData::S ...
CVE-2021-42260.summary: TinyXML through 2.6.2 has an infinite loop in TiXmlParsingData::Stamp in tinyxmlparser.cpp via the TIXML_UTF_LEAD_0 case. It can be triggered by a crafted XML message and leads to a denial of service.

CVE-2023-34194.title: StringEqual in TiXmlDeclaration::Parse in tinyxmlparser.cpp in Ti ...
CVE-2023-34194.summary: StringEqual in TiXmlDeclaration::Parse in tinyxmlparser.cpp in TinyXML through 2.6.2 has a reachable assertion (and application exit) via a crafted XML document with a '\0' located after whitespace.

CVE-2023-40458.title: Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop') vulnerabil ...
CVE-2023-40458.summary:
Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop') vulnerability in Sierra Wireless, Inc ALEOS could potentially allow a remote attacker to trigger a 
Denial of Service (DoS) condition for ACEManager without impairing 
other router functions. This condition is cleared by restarting the 
device.
